message: I wanted to ask about the scalpel, so I visited Tonny's house, but there was no response; either he wasn't home or he was just pretending.
If it were Yuriko, she might pull out her detective's toolkit and try to break in, but I can't do something like that.
It seems like Tonny is out. I'll come back later.
Tonny doesn't seem to be here. Surely, he's not avoiding me, right?
I feel like he’s trying to avoid me.
He’s really not here. Tonny, are you really avoiding me?
